title: これ、スタックしている？ • 現在タスクは thin-core を維持したまま drift 耐性と自動反 映を次段まで進めること として扱います。まず現行の lane 可 用性を current-run で確認し、6 本の active lane を立てて から実装に入ります。 • Spawned Feynman [reviewer] └ [phase:plan] [family:layering] [provider_hint:codex] Current task: continue Kernel hardening without increasing always-loaded con...
summary_text: **Success Evidence Checkpoints** - Workflow run accepts both `workflow_dispatch` and `repository_dispatch`, and uses `record_id/payload_b64` from either event shape: [kernel-task-completion-backup.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/.github/workflows/kernel-task-completion-backup.yml#L3), [kernel-task-completion-backup.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/.github/workflows/kernel-task-completion-backup.yml#L34). - Decode step must output canonical `safe_record_id`, `payload_sha256`, `mirror_path`, `receipt_path`, and fail if tokenized paths do not match canonical form: [kernel-task-completion-backup.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/.github/workflows/kernel-task-completion-backup.yml#L94), [kernel-task-completion-backup.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/.github/workflows/kernel-task-completion-backup.yml#L106). - Run summary should include record metadata plus `payload_sha256`, durable branch, and receipt path: [kernel-task-completion-backup.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/.github/workflows/kernel-task-completion-backup.yml#L116). - Durable branch `kernel-task-completion-backups` must contain mirror payload and receipt JSON; receipt must include provenance (`run_id`, `run_attempt`, `event_name`, `created_at`): [kernel-task-completion-backup.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/.github/workflows/kernel-task-completion-backup.yml#L150), [kernel-task-completion-backup.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/.github/workflows/kernel-task-completion-backup.yml#L182). - Local reconcile is only complete when dispatch is `ok` and reconcile is `verified`; CLI reports non-zero otherwise (`pending` => tempfail): [cli.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/cli.py#L863), [cli.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/cli.py#L889). - Reconcile verifies mirror payload equality, receipt subset equality, and receipt provenance presence; failure on any mismatch: [task_backup.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/task_backup.py#L1633), [task_backup.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/task_backup.py#L1669), [task_backup.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/task_backup.py#L1682). - Journal evidence should include `gha_dispatch_accepted` and `gha_mirror_verified`, and `.project-os` artifact `gha.*` fields should reflect final status and mirror commit: [task_backup.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/task_backup.py#L679), [task_backup.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/task_backup.py#L706), [task_backup.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/task_backup.py#L350). **Likely Mismatch Points** - `record_id` sanitization or canonical token-path mismatch (`gha_mirror_path` / `gha_receipt_path`) causes hard workflow failure before mirror write: [kernel-task-completion-backup.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/.github/workflows/kernel-task-completion-backup.yml#L46), [kernel-task-completion-backup.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/.github/workflows/kernel-task-completion-backup.yml#L97). - Dispatch mode auto-fallback may switch transport (`workflow_dispatch` -> `repository_dispatch`), so receipt `event_name` can differ from operator expectation: [task_backup.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/task_backup.py#L1268), [task_backup.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/task_backup.py#L1775). - Bound Project OS envelope can fail at repo-side reverify due to ticket ambiguity, acceptance mismatch, or status drift: [kernel-task-completion-backup.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/.github/workflows/kernel-task-completion-backup.yml#L143), [reverify-kernel-task-completion-envelope.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/lo...
